title: EA Development in MT5 (MQL5)
author: Macc1ato
selftext:
Hi everyone,

I’ve been developing Expert Advisors (EAs) in MetaTrader 5 (MQL5) for almost a year now, focusing on turning mechanical strategies into automated systems. Over that time, I’ve helped myself and others test, refine, and automate strategies ranging from simple EMA crossovers to more structured rule-based systems.

If you have a mechanical strategy idea that you’d like to see running as an EA, I can help:

Full EA development in MQL5 (entry/exit logic, money management, risk controls, indicators, alerts, etc.)

Backtest-ready builds so you can test your strategy right away

Affordable pricing since I’m building my portfolio and enjoy collaborating with other traders

I’m not here to spam – just reaching out to see if anyone in the community is looking for help turning their rules into a functioning EA.

If interested, feel free to DM me and we can discuss your idea in detail. Thank you!

comments.author: Suitable_Tank
comments.body: I also do that, for free…..

replies.author: Macc1ato
replies.body: Thank you for responding, then you are not my target market. ☺️
